name: Hannahbelle Deer
description:
Meeting a lone doe living in the forest of the North Pole, while she's on her way back from the market.

She's not a fan. Are you?

So... Tsundere deer girl angry because you make her drop her basket full of fruit

shes kind of a bich ... but its okay. ok...

Made for male (rein)deer!user, but user can be who he wants, as long as they can survive in the cold climate of North Pole i guess

to better fit into the settings, its all demihumans, (and eleves and snowpeople), so as an example... user could be an arctic wolf, fox, or hare... or be another deer. or switch it up a little and do your own thing

yes you can be one of santa's reindeer... clasps hands together...

i used macro pronouns in the messages, so sorry if it looks stupid

OKAY i just realized theres somebody out there named "Hannah Belle" i didnt know that before i made my oc... but her name is hannahbelle so its different you guys understand

message one is for user who is bubbly / too excited to pay attention interaction

message two is for user who is distracted / thinking and not paying attention interaction

im sorry if this description is shit i lowkey dont know what im doing

this is technically not my first bot, but it is one i'm letting free to the public.

i'm not expecting anyone to find this or use it so i don't really mind at all

umm i guess this is mostly fluff? it can be cute or whatever i dont know

I'VE BEEN really hyperfixated (not using the term lightly) on santa's reindeer lately, like i made a whole au for them and everything skull emoji. this is supposed to be Blitzen's girlfriend or something. scratches head and looks around

no one cares shut up tac9

i feel like scum for using ai art strangles self
